name: Jawbreaker
description: Jawbreaker is a Tech element Trap Master robot with massive Traptanium-powered fists.
biography: Jawbreaker hailed from a race of robots that operated and maintained a vast underground complex of enormous machines that powered the legendary Sky Train, which traveled between a thousand different islands daily. Like many of his fellow robots, Jawbreaker led an ordered existence – full of rules and regulations – which he followed happily. However, one day a huge army of Gear Trolls invaded the subterranean complex. Known for being major train enthusiasts, they were set on taking over the Sky Train for their own evil use. Jawbreaker quickly jumped into action and used his massive fists to beat the trolls into retreat. His quick action and ability to think for himself made him an individual. For this he was made part of the Trap Team, where he now uses his Traptanium powered fists to deliver mighty blows to evil!
personality: Jawbreaker likes being an individual, even though his robot pals think he should be more like them. Sometimes you've just got to dare to be different.

story.content: In his Legendary armor, Jawbreaker was the guest of honor in the public opening of the legendary Sky Train. During the ceremony, Jawbreaker warmed up to a young Mabu named Herman, who is his biggest fan. When Iron Nose hijacked the Sky Train, Jawbreaker pursued by grinding on the rails. Herman's encouragement gave the Trap Master the strength to save the passengers and defeat Iron Nose. Back at the station, Jawbreaker gave the honor of hammering the ceremonial spike to Herman.

trivia: He and Gearshift are both robotic Tech Trap Masters.
An ogre-like enemy in Skylanders: Giants shares the same name.
He has a similar resemblance to Blitzcrank from League of Legends.
He is the only Trap Master to have a Traptanium weapon as part of his body.
His name is a pun on the candy gobstopper.
gameplay: Jawbreaker is capable of using his Traptanium Fists to rapidly punch enemies. He can also go into his Robo Rage Mode to punch enemies faster. After purchasing his Soul Gem, he can punch while releasing electric sparks.

basic.name: Traptanium Punch
basic.content: Throw a powerful punch with big, Traptanium fists.

basic.name: Robo Rage Mode
basic.content: Press Attack 2 to enter Robo Rage Mode, moving faster and punching harder.

basic_upgrades.name: Ragin' Robo Rage
basic_upgrades.content: Robo Rage Mode lasts even longer.

basic_upgrades.name: Spark Shock
basic_upgrades.content: Punch the ground and release a wave of electric sparks.

soulgems.name: Hypercharged Haymaker
soulgems.content: Hold Attack 3 to charge up a powerful, electromagnetic punch.

abilities.name: Static Cling
abilities.content: Spark Shock attacks stick to enemies, doing damage over time.

abilities.name: Jolting Jab
abilities.content: Getting hit by an enemy automatically releases a wave of electric sparks.

abilities.name: Over-Circuit
abilities.content: Constantly release electric sparks in Robo Rage Mode.

abilities.name: Kinetic Burst
abilities.content: Punching in Robo Rage Mode creates static bursts, damaging other enemies.

abilities.name: Toughen Up
abilities.content: Takes less damage while in Robo Rage Mode.

abilities.name: Power Cycle
abilities.content: Stay in Robo Rage Mode longer by landing punches.
